metadesc: Is esports safe for kids in Malaysia? KITAMEN gives young players a supervised, structured environment that balances screen time, online safety and studies.

Host a professional esports tournament in Malaysia without owning gaming PCs. KITAMEN supplies PlayPods, venue setup and livestreaming for a complete event.
The story behind the KITAMEN name and brand: how a fellow Malaysian's idea inspired the identity of one of the country's earliest esports pioneers.
